name: DAIWIK PALAVARAPU
summary: Aspiring Software Engineering student with a solid foundation in problem-solving and real-world application development, driven to contribute to meaningful projects and expand technical expertise in a professional environment.

projects.name: DLRL Internship: Computer Vision System for Drone Detection
projects.description: Implemented a computer vision–based system to detect unauthorized drones in restricted airspace using camera input. (Jun 2025-Aug 2025)
resume_bullets: Implemented a computer vision–based system to detect unauthorized drones in restricted airspace using camera input.

projects.name: SmartPocket: Voice-Based Financial Assistant for Teens
projects.description: Developed an AI-powered financial assistant capable of handling 1000+ expense records, enabling efficient budget management. (Jan 2025-Mar 2025)
features: Improved expense logging efficiency by 40% through conversational and voice-based interaction.
Delivered low-latency responses for real-time financial tracking.
resume_bullets: Developed an AI-powered financial assistant capable of handling 1000+ expense records, enabling efficient budget management.

projects.name: AI-Powered Document Verification System
projects.description: Engineered an OCR-based verification system with 99.27% accuracy, automating identity document validation. (Sep 2025-Nov 2025)
features: Reduced manual verification effort by 60%+ by streamlining document processing and data extraction workflows.
Designed database storage for verification records and extracted metadata, enabling efficient retrieval and audit tracking.
resume_bullets: Engineered an OCR-based verification system with 99.27% accuracy, automating identity document validation.

projects.name: LLM from scratch
projects.description: Built fundamental components of a Large Language Model from scratch as part of the Vizuara series, including tokenization, embeddings, and attention mechanism.
features: Implemented scaled dot-product attention to capture contextual dependencies in sequence data.
Developed strong understanding of deep learning concepts such as vectorization, matrix operations, and computational workflows.
